description: Default Ensemble permissions. The remote URL allowlist matches our sidecar's loopback HTTP origin (src-tauri/src/lib.rs:187) — Tauri otherwise refuses to inject __TAURI_INTERNALS__ into the webview, which breaks the custom-titlebar drag region and the WindowControls IPC (minimize/maximize/close). 127.0.0.1 is loopback-only and the page is served from our bundled sidecar.
